creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Ok, from the top:

ssl=openssl bakes a dependency on openssl package into mpd5 from the time USES=ssl was set.

removing the USES=ssl removes the dependency from openssl package, but the previous package remains installed.

Now if you do pkg-upgrade all packages still dependent on ssl=openssl will move to ssl=openssl111, but pkg fails to do this because it doesn't know mpd5 needs an update so it leaves it alone, but then has to stop because mpd5 installed depends on openssl while it has to install openssl111 for everything else.

The solution is to add the revision bump to force pkg-upgrade to pick up the mpd5 change.


Cheers,
Franco
